title: senecio violifolius
intro: Senecio violifolius, also known as Violet-leaved Ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a purgative and emetic, to induce vomiting and diarrhea. The plant's health benefits include its potential to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and treat fever, although it is essential to note that it can be toxic in large quantities due to its pyrrolizidine alkaloids content. Senecio violifolius can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as tinctures and infusions, although its use should be carefully considered under the guidance of a medical professional.
